description: Structured handoff contract between agents (LangGraph Command pattern adapted for file-based)
research_sources: LangGraph Command(goto) — typed state schemas, scoped updates
Augment Code multi-agent orchestration — 36.94% coordination failures without contracts
Addy Osmani micro-specs — decompose features into atomic contracts

required_fields.intent: string — one-sentence description of what to do
required_fields.input: object — typed input data matching input_schema
required_fields.expected_output: object — typed output data matching output_schema
required_fields.verify_command: string — runnable command to validate output (exit 0 = pass)

optional_fields.context_files: string[] — files to load into agent context
optional_fields.context_skills: string[] — skills to inject (matches SKILLS_INDEX.json names)
optional_fields.context_genes: string[] — DNA gene IDs to inject
optional_fields.rollback_plan: string — what to do if verify_command fails
optional_fields.depends_on: string[] — task_ids that must complete first

usage: Coordinator writes handoff to memory/handover/<task_id>.json before routing. Specialist reads, validates against schema, executes, then writes output matching output_schema. Coordinator runs verify_command to confirm.
